process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Haan, Germany). 500 mg total mass per chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions. Stored over phosphorous pentoxide at -20 °C until use.
detection_methods: XRPD (X'Pert PRO MPD, Cu Kα, 5-35° 2θ); DSC (TA-DSC Q100, 10 K/min, single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR (Varian 3100 ATR).
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5 desiccator). XRPD detected onset at day 128, FTIR at day 133. Authors found NO molecular SVS-GPZ interactions (FTIR + PCA); stability attributed to GPZ acting as anti-plasticizer (higher Tg of GPZ pulls mixture Tg up). Flory-Huggins χ(298 K) = 5.5 ± 2.0 (predicts immiscibility, but milling forced single-phase). process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch) placed in cold room (+4 °C). 500 mg total mass with three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber; 30 Hz for 60 min. Chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen for 2 min prior to milling and at 10 min intervals during milling to ensure cryogenic conditions. Allowed to reach ambient T in P2O5 desiccator before opening.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 79. Tg = 41.5 ± 5.1 °C; Tg of 2:1 CM identical to 2:1 BM within error — milling method did not affect Tg or FTIR spectra. | [review] Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 74 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — ICH Q1A long-term. XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 65. Notable: 1:1 CM at 60% RH stable >2 months while 1:1 APM crystallized within 3 days at same RH — strong evidence that molecular-level mixing (single phase) outperforms physical mixing of pre-amorphized drugs against humidity.

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals. Note: ball milling alone did not amorphize 1:2 (residual GPZ peaks); cryomilling was required.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 95; FTIR day 92. 1:2 CM is the most stable mixture in this study (highest GPZ content → highest Tg = 53.6 °C). Authors emphasize stabilization is bulk-Tg / anti-plasticizer driven (NOT specific intermolecular interactions, which were ruled out by FTIR/PCA/Flory-Huggins). | [review] Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 95 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — ICH Q1A long-term. XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 58. 1:2 CM remained stable >2 months even at 60% RH — the most stable composition in the study, attributable to highest Tg (53.6 °C) from highest GPZ (anti-plasticizer) content.
